system.armor: 1 (speed), 2 vs. attacks from above the water
system.moves:
- Slink up on potential prey
- Screech to attract other eels (barely heard above the water)
- Attack in a frenzied swarm, all bites and screeches and churning bloody water

About 5’ or 6’ long. They mostly prey on fish or fowl, hunting silently and by them- selves. Somehow, though, they learned that people are delicious. Too big for one eel to tackle, sure. But people in the water are clumsy and oblivious. So when a screech eel spots someone in the water, it calls out to its friends. And when enough of them have gathered, they feast.
